description_long: This is a compact, tactical shotgun with a bullpup configuration, featuring a tan and black color scheme. The body is primarily constructed from polymer with visible metal components, and it has a short, robust barrel housed within a ventilated upper rail system. The shotgun includes a pistol grip integrated into the main body, and a tubular magazine is visible beneath the barrel. The design is modern and utilitarian, with a focus on maneuverability and ease of use in close-quarters urban environments. Two red shotgun shells are shown alongside the weapon, indicating its ammunition type. The overall appearance suggests a high degree of durability and functionality, suitable for tactical or law enforcement applications.
description: A compact, tan and black bullpup shotgun with a ventilated rail, pistol grip, and tubular magazine, designed for tactical use. Two red shotgun shells are displayed beside it.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, barrel opening, and the alignment of the upper rail system.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the shotgun, the pistol grip, trigger guard, tubular magazine, and a red shotgun shell.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock end, rear sight, and the symmetry of the upper rail.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite side of the shotgun, the pistol grip, trigger guard, tubular magazine, and a red shotgun shell.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a tubular magazine beneath and a ventilated upper rail
attribute_stock_type: no stock (bullpup configuration with integrated shoulder pad)
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rectangular trigger guard with integrated finger grooves and reinforcement
